summary: Horizontal video, a recorded Fox News segment with a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner. Anchor Harris Faulkner interviews DHS Asst. Secretary Tricia McLaughlin, who appears remotely in front of a U.S. flag and DHS seal, about a New York Times report titled 'THE SELF-DEPORTERS' and a poll showing 58% support for Trump deportation efforts, with B-roll of migrants in Denver. The audio is the anchor and official talking, with no music.
notable_text: RPT: MORE IMMIGRANTS OPEN TO SELF-DEPORTATION; POLL: 58% SUPPORT TRUMP DEPORTATION EFFORTS; The New York Times - THE SELF-DEPORTERS; FOX NEWS ALERT
